urdu transliteration text:
Mohamed ka Gharana Kerbala walo biyaba mein,
Qayamat ki khiza aye hai zehra ki gulistam’e
Arbaeen
english translation text: Muhammad’s household are the people of Karbala, and it’s wilderness.Judgement day has descended on Zahra’s garden

urdu transliteration text:
Lashe Aun o Mohamed Aaka laye jo ran se
Zainab ne uthhaye hathho shukre Ilahi mein
Arbaeen
english translation text: When the bodies of Aun and Muhammad were brought to the tentsZainab lifted her hands in gratitude (to Allah)

Mohamed ka Ghrana Kerbala walo biyaba mein,

Arbaeen
english translation text: Muhammad’s household are the people of Karbala, and it’s wilderness.Judgement day has descended on Zahra’s garden

urdu transliteration text:
Kahan ho tum, Ali akber zaara awaaz to dena
Akela rehgayaa hai Ali ka lal maidan mein,
Arbaeen
english translation text: Where are you, O’ Akbar, call out to meAli’s son is left alone in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Lashe Ali Akber nahin uthtee hai Aqaa se,
Ya Ali zara Najaf se uthhke ayee o maidan mein
Arbaeen
english translation text: My master (Hussain) cannot carry the corpse of his son AkbarO Ali, come from Najaf to the battlefield to his aid

urdu transliteration text:
Mohamed ka Ghrana Kerbala walo biyaba mein,

Arbaeen
english translation text: Muhammad’s household are the people of Karbala, and it’s wilderness.Judgement day has descended on Zahra’s garden

urdu transliteration text:
Zameen e Karbala usko zaraa araam se rakhna
Sulaya hai Asger ko tere Daman me
Arbaeen
english translation text: Oh land of Karbala, take tender care of Asghar,He has been laid to rest tenderly in your lap

urdu transliteration text:
Mohamed ka Ghrana Kerbala walo biyaba mein,
Qayamat ki khiza aye hai zehra ki gulistam’e
Arbaeen
english translation text: Muhammad’s household are the people of Karbala, and it’s wilderness.Judgement day has descended on Zahra’s garden

urdu transliteration text:
Tum nade Ali padke jalti khakh pe sona
Sakina ghabra nahi hum ayenge khwaba mein
Arbaeen
english translation text: Recite Naade Ali and sleep on the scorching groundFear not Sakina I will come to comfort you in your dreams

urdu transliteration text:

Arbaeen
english translation text: Muhammad’s household are the people of Karbala, and it’s wilderness.Judgement day has descended on Zahra’s garden

urdu transliteration text:
Gireba chakh sirpe khakh Zainab ke bandhe bazu
Bhala pehchanti Hind ise hale pare
shamein
Arbaeen
english translation text: With torn clothes, dust in her hair and  bound hands, How will Hind recognize Zainab in thisdistressed state

urdu transliteration text:

Arbaeen

urdu transliteration text:
Loota tau Karbala mein muslmano ne kya loota
Ali ki betiyo kan chadre aye hai sama mein
Arbaeen
english translation text: If the ‘muslims’ were to plunder the house of Zahra in Karbala, what did they decide to loot? Ali’ daughters veils are included in the war booty
